ogTitle: Wonbah Forest vs Wondalli: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Wonbah Forest and Wondalli.
heading: Wonbah Forest vs Wondalli — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Wonbah Forest, Queensland and Wondalli, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Wonbah Forest has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Wondalli (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Wonbah Forest or Wondalli safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Wonbah Forest has a flood risk score of 35/100, while Wondalli scores 21/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Wonbah Forest scores 47/100 for bushfire risk. Wondalli scores 60/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Wonbah Forest or Wondalli?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Wonbah Forest has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.55% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
